name: Selective Freeze on Random Linear Maps — Why Freezing Gate+Up Beats Full Freeze + LoRA
author: Himanshu Dongre
notes: Implements OpenAI wishlist item. Selective freeze (gate+up only, 37%) outperforms full freeze + LoRA (94%). Larger frozen model beats smaller learned model by 11.5% on FineWeb at same artifact budget. H100 validated.
